rationale: Educ. Code §19.008 governs allocation of foundation school fund money based on contact hours. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises.
quote: The commissioner shall allocate funds to the district from the foundation school fund based on an amount, established in the General Appropriations Act, for each contact hour between a teacher and a person eligible under Section 19.005
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute's operative provisions.
